term1: You agree that the statements and methods made in your attached research proposal are complete and accurate.
term2: You will not use the data for purposes other than described in your research proposal.
term3: You will not permit others to use the data except for collaborators involved with the research as described in your proposal.  Access to the SEER-Medicare data shall be limited to the minimum number of individuals necessary to achieve the purpose stated in your proposal.  The number of locations where the data are located shall also be minimized and specific location details must be provided in your proposal’s data storage and management plan. If you plan to move the data to a new location at your institute you must contact NCI in writing prior to moving the data for instruction on how to handle the SEER-Medicare data.
